params.name: Dragon Sr. Statue
params.description:
This statue of a legendary anime master is the vessel for the soul of a manga artist who created countless classic characters and legendary stories. Touching it, one can feel the inspiration bursting forth and the endless strength guiding the holder towards higher and greater goals.
[In memory of the master who has passed away]
1955.4.5—2024.3.1
params.ss1:
